description: Command frontmatter missing required `name` field; slash command may not register in Claude Code
suggested_fix: Add `name: setup-video-vision` to the YAML frontmatter block

description: Command frontmatter missing required `name` field; slash command may not register in Claude Code
suggested_fix: Add `name: watch-video` to the YAML frontmatter block

description: Command calls video_configure, video_setup, video_watch but declares no `allowed-tools` frontmatter field
Command calls video_info, video_analyze, video_watch, video_detail, video_setup but declares no `allowed-tools` frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add `allowed-tools: [video_info, video_analyze, video_watch, video_detail, video_setup]` to frontmatter

description: Agent has zero example blocks; no input/output demonstration provided
suggested_fix: Add at least one example block showing a frame image input and the expected Frame at [timestamp] — ... output format

description: Command requires a video path (marked required) but provides no instruction for handling invocation with no arguments
suggested_fix: Add a fallback clause: if no video path is provided, ask the user to supply one before proceeding

description: Vague quantifier: "brief summary" — brevity is undefined and model-dependent
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete bound, e.g. "a 2-3 sentence summary covering duration, main content, and audio"

description: Vague quantifier: "keep it concise" — no measurable standard defined
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete instruction, e.g. "limit explanations to one sentence per option"

description: Vague quantifier: "comprehensive summary" — comprehensiveness is undefined
suggested_fix: Replace with a structured template, e.g. "a summary covering: video duration, main events in chronological order, any notable audio or text"

description: Vague quantifier: "relevant" in trigger condition — which scenarios qualify is left implicit
suggested_fix: The filter selection table on line 34 partially resolves this; consider referencing it from the trigger description

description: Vague quantifier: "smart extraction decisions" — no criterion for what constitutes a smart decision
suggested_fix: Remove the word "smart"; the surrounding numbered steps already define the extraction strategy concretely

description: Vague quantifier: "brief moments" — duration is unquantified
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete bound, e.g. "moments under 2 seconds"

description: MCP server invoked via `npx -y claude-video-vision@latest`; auto-installs and executes the latest npm publish without version pinning, creating a supply-chain execution surface
suggested_fix: Pin to a specific version: `"claude-video-vision@1.3.1"` and update intentionally after reviewing release notes

description: Four runtime dependencies (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod, @google/genai, openai) use `^` semver ranges; downstream builds may silently pick up minor-version changes
suggested_fix: Lock to exact versions in production or commit a lockfile (package-lock.json) and review dependency updates explicitly

description: plugin.json declares version 1.2.0 but mcp-server/package.json declares 1.3.1; manifest is one minor version behind
suggested_fix: Update plugin.json `version` field to `1.3.1` to match the npm package

description: plugin.json has no `commands` field; commands/setup-video-vision.md and commands/watch-video.md may not be registered if Claude Code requires explicit declaration
suggested_fix: Add `"commands": "./commands/"` to plugin.json (or explicit command list) to ensure both commands are registered

description: plugin.json has no `agents` field; agents/frame-describer.md may not be registered if Claude Code requires explicit declaration
suggested_fix: Add `"agents": "./agents/"` to plugin.json to ensure frame-describer is registered
